title: DecisionVerdict
description: Minimal on-the-wire decision verdict payload produced by decision routing. This intentionally models daimyo's shipped DecisionVerdict shape and is not the full ADR-1 Role result.
$comment: DecisionVerdict is reusable payload data, not an envelope artifact. RoleResult mapping is documented in protocol/README; mapping logic belongs in runtime code.

type.description: REQUIRED string. Verdict category from daimyo's shipped shape.

suggested_choice.description: REQUIRED string or null. Machine-readable option, action, or access choice suggested by the decision provider.

suggested_response.description: REQUIRED string or null. Human-readable response or instruction associated with the suggested choice.

block_trigger.description: REQUIRED boolean. True when the verdict should block execution or escalate instead of proceeding.
